title: Octotel and Fly.Cool launch premium fibre without contracts
bodyText:
Advertorial

BUSINESS NEWS - Octotel, South Africa's best-rated fibre network, has partnered with Fly.Cool, a leading prepaid ISP, to launch Octotel's Flexi Connect Prepaid - premium quality fibre without contracts or credit checks.


> This innovative product brings affordable, high-speed fibre to over 50 000 homes across the Western Cape.


Flexi Connect offers 30 days of uncapped, high-speed internet with free installation, a complimentary router and the freedom to connect on your own terms. Customers top up when they want via card, EasyPay outlets or apps with no long-term commitments, hidden fees, or compromises on quality.

"Prepaid Flexi Connect makes premium fibre more accessible," says Faizel Ismail, Octotel general manager. "Whether you're a student, young professional, family, or entrepreneur, you can enjoy the same world-class Octotel connectivity with payment flexibility."

Fly.Cool chief operations officer, Farzana Wadee, adds: "We've removed traditional barriers like contracts and credit checks, giving customers control. From streaming to studying, business to gaming - Flexi Connect works for everyone."

With over 60 000 prepaid customers served since 2021, Fly.Cool brings proven prepaid expertise to Octotel's robust fibre network. Installations are completed within days, ensuring quick, seamless access to unlimited device connections.

This launch is part of Octotel's vision for a more connected Western Cape - creating products that are flexible, inclusive and community-first.

Octotel Flexi Connect Prepaid is now available via www.fly.cool in select areas.

Experience premium fibre, no strings attached.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
